title: New Zealand Information Security Manual (NZISM) v3.9
description: The NZISM is New Zealand Government's comprehensive information security standard defining baseline and enhanced controls for protecting government information and systems across all classification levels. It establishes certification and accreditation processes, roles and responsibilities, and compliance requirements for government departments, agencies, and entities.
